scope.gallery_requirement: GALLERY_1 is the exact owner-approved price/customer-note card; 4-6 additional unique recipe-relevant or approved neutral-context images

observed_copy: We understand that our prices might be a bit higher — that's because we invest in
Insulated foam cooler and gel packs
It's more than a meal — it's our way of taking care of you

summary.pass_definition: Exact fixed card in GALLERY_1 + 4-6 relevant additional images + sealed validation pass + at least 3 stable post-write reads
summary.blocked_definition: Gallery passed the sealed point-in-time live snapshot but has no later current readback
summary.fail_definition: Stored live snapshot fails one or more gallery requirements and the sealed repair has no verified readback
